arts.ttl: Everton handed potential transfer boost – Trio of transfer rivals couldn’t compete financially
arts.sum: Everton are one of the teams keen on signing Richarlison from Tottenham this summer and may have an advantage in the race. That’s at least according to Jorge Nicola, who reports that Everton are looking at bringing their former star back to the club this summer. The journalist covers reports in Brazil surrounding Richarlison today, The post Everton handed potential transfer boost – Trio of transfer rivals couldn’t compete financially appeared first on Sport Witness.
